data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of offering different languages for the tour experience. However, the evidence only confirms that Spanish and English options are available, without any indication of additional language support or flexibility. This indicates a gap in fulfilling the requirement as it does not demonstrate comprehensive language coverage beyond the stated options.
gaps: The evidence does not confirm that the tour supports multiple languages beyond Spanish and English.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
